title: Mask token tracking to map area
description: Ensure token tracking only occurs for tokens within the designated map area. Tokens visible to the camera that fall outside the active map boundaries should be filtered or masked out to prevent interference and improve performance.
close_reason: Implemented map bounds masking in TokenFilter and updated TrackingCoordinator to pass SVG dimensions.

title: Implement Caching for SVG Map Rendering
description: Implement a caching mechanism for rendered SVG viewports. Quantize parameters like zoom and pan to maximize cache hits. This should eliminate render spikes for complex maps during static viewing.
close_reason: Implemented pan quantization for SVG caching

title: Critical Review: Algorithm Accuracy and Structural Integrity
description: Perform a deep-dive review of the whitepaper to ensure it accurately reflects the implemented algorithms in the code. Verify the abstract, introduction, and conclusion are precise and comprehensive.
close_reason: Reviewed codebase to ensure algorithms match whitepaper descriptions. Corrected calibration workflow order in main.tex and plan.md to reflect proper dependency chain (PPI before Extrinsics).

title: Critical Review of Whitepaper: Accuracy and Structure
description: Perform a critical review of the whitepaper to ensure it is accurate to the implemented algorithm in the code. Ensure it has an accurate abstract, intro, and conclusions.
close_reason: Completed critical review while writing the whitepaper, accurately reflecting parallax correction, GStreamer, and Structured Light parameters.

title: Epic: Remote Application Driver (Light-Map WebDriver)
description: Implement a remote control protocol and driver to automate the application for end-to-end testing and remote orchestration. Similar to WebDriver, this should allow programmatic injection of gestures, map loading commands, and state verification.

title: Profile and Identify Algorithmic Bottlenecks
description: Use profiling tools (cProfile, py-spy) to identify hotspots in the main loop and coordinate transformations.

title: Draw token name with dark background for readability
description: Enhance token name rendering in the UI by adding a dark background behind the text labels. This ensures that token names are always legible regardless of the underlying map content or surface brightness.
close_reason: Implemented draw_text_with_background helper and updated all token-related UI elements to use it for better readability.

title: Write Results, Conclusion, and References
description: Analyze tracking performance and summarize future work.
close_reason: Whitepaper content successfully added based on code.

title: Bug: Token names rendered above instead of below
description: Currently, token names are rendered above the token (y = sy - radius - 10). They should be rendered below the token to avoid overlap with other UI elements and improve readability.
close_reason: Changed token name rendering position to be below the token (y = sy + radius + 20) and added a regression test.

title: Hide mouse pointer during application execution
description: Implement logic to hide the mouse cursor when the main application window is active, especially in fullscreen mode, to ensure a seamless projection experience.
close_reason: Implemented ProjectorWindow class using tkinter to provide a fullscreen window with a hidden mouse cursor, and updated hand_tracker.py and calibration_logic.py to use it.

title: Configuration and session files not saved to user data directory
description: The files map_state.json, sessions/*.json and potentially session.json are not being saved to ~/.local/share/light_map. They should follow XDG base directory specifications for user data.
close_reason: Implemented XDG-compliant path defaults for configuration (map_state.json), sessions, and logs using StorageManager. Updated MapConfigManager, SessionManager, AppConfig, and ScanningScene to respect these defaults.

title: Write Token Tracking and Implementation section
description: Detail Aruco detection, flash-based detection, and the software architecture.
close_reason: Whitepaper content successfully added based on code.

title: Setup LaTeX template and write Introduction
description: Create main.tex, define preamble, and write the abstract/introduction.
close_reason: LaTeX template and Introduction completed.

title: Implement Embedded SVG <image> Support
description: Support for the <image> tag to allow raster textures or logos to be embedded within the SVG maps.
close_reason: Already implemented <image> support.

title: Plan whitepaper structure and LaTeX environment
description: Define the sections, mathematical models to include, and set up the LaTeX project structure.
close_reason: Planning complete

title: Critical Review of Whitepaper
description: Review the whitepaper for accuracy against the implemented code algorithms. Ensure it has a high-quality abstract, introduction, and conclusion that accurately reflect the project goals and outcomes.
close_reason: Updated structured light description to match code implementation

title: Migrate current configuration to new token schema
description: Implement logic to automatically migrate existing 'aruco_defaults' and 'token_profiles' from the main map_state.json file to the new 'tokens.json' file upon first run. Ensure that old data is safely removed or backed up after a successful migration.
close_reason: Implemented automatic migration and separation of token configuration into tokens.json.

title: Track Menu Selection Frequency
description: Add instrumentation to log and persist the frequency of menu item selections. This data will be used to optimize the menu hierarchy by surfacing commonly used items.
close_reason: Added AnalyticsManager to track and persist menu selection frequencies.

title: Parallelize ArUco and Structured Light Detection
description: Investigate running ArUco marker detection and structured light dot-grid processing in parallel threads.

title: Optimize Hand Masking via Hull Approximation and Caching
description: Hand masking is a per-frame overhead. Improve performance by simplifying the hulls or caching mask images.
close_reason: Implemented hull approximation using approxPolyDP and mask caching

title: Epic: System Instrumentation and Analytics
description: Implement telemetry and statistics gathering to understand system usage and performance bottlenecks. This includes tracking UI interaction patterns and detailed pipeline latency measurements.

title: Modularize configuration storage and serialization
description: Centralize configuration storage (loading and saving) into a dedicated class/module to improve separation of concerns. Currently, serialization logic is spread across MapConfigManager and SessionManager. The new implementation should provide a clean API for persistence and potentially support different storage backends or formats if needed in the future.
close_reason: Centralized config loading/saving into ConfigStore class

title: Commit whitepaper source
description: Commit the updated docs/whitepaper/main.tex and ensure build artifacts are ignored.
close_reason: Committed main.tex and updated .gitignore.

title: Critical Review: Publication Readiness and Algorithmic Alignment
description: Perform a final critical review of the whitepaper (docs/whitepaper/main.tex) to: 1. Ensure absolute accuracy relative to the implemented algorithms in the code. 2. Verify the abstract, introduction, and conclusions are accurate and compelling. 3. Determine if the paper is ready for publication.
close_reason: Completed final critical review and algorithmic alignment of the whitepaper with the implementation.

title: Remove legacy configuration migration logic
description: Clean up the migration bridge in MapConfigManager now that the transition to tokens.json is complete. This includes removing the _migration_performed flag and the fallback logic in _load().
close_reason: Removed legacy configuration migration logic as requested.

title: Epic: Expand SVG Primitive Support
description: Extend the SVGLoader to support a wider range of SVG elements. High priority includes <text> for labels/titles, followed by <image> for raster embeddings, and complex path types. This will enable richer map detail and direct UI rendering from SVG source.

title: Implement End-to-End Latency Instrumentation
description: Develop a mechanism to measure timing across the full pipeline: Projector Output -> Camera Capture -> Vision Processing (Tokens/Hands) -> Render. Track and display these statistics for performance monitoring.

title: Write Mathematical Foundations and Calibration section
description: Explain pinhole models, homographies, and the specific calibration workflow used in the project.
close_reason: Whitepaper content successfully added based on code.

title: Tests polluting user configuration with 'test_map' entries
description: Running tests (specifically 'test_scan_normalization_fix.py') adds 'test_map.svg' entries to the user's ~/.config/light_map/map_state.json. This is because InteractiveApp and MapConfigManager are instantiated without a mock StorageManager in some tests, causing them to fall back to the default production storage paths. Tests should use a temporary directory for all storage operations.
close_reason: Fixed by updating multiple test files (test_scan_normalization_fix.py, test_token_count_display.py, test_unknown_token_visuals.py, test_interactive_app_scenes.py, test_interactive_app_render_regression.py, test_interactive_app_masking.py) to use a temporary StorageManager via the tmp_path fixture. This prevents tests from falling back to production XDG paths and polluting the user's ~/.config/light_map/map_state.json file.

title: Parallelize Vision and Rendering Pipelines
description: Decouple camera capture and AI processing (hand/token detection) from the main rendering loop. Implement a producer-consumer model using a threading architecture to allow the UI to remain responsive (e.g., 60 FPS) even when vision tasks are slower (e.g., 10-15 FPS).

title: Map Interaction: Stepped Panning by Grid Size
description: Update map interaction to snap panning (but not zoom) to grid-size increments, ensuring better alignment with the projected grid.
close_reason: Completed

title: Epic: SVG Wall Support for Fog of War and Visibility
description: Brainstorm and implement support for walls encoded in SVG maps to enable Fog of War and line-of-sight visibility logic. This involves defining SVG conventions, path parsing, and a visibility engine.

title: Epic: Web-Based Control Interface
description: Brainstorm and implement a web-based dashboard to manage system settings (token definitions, map loading, etc.) and explore additional control features. This starts with an interactive design phase.

title: Add support for basic SVG shapes (rect, circle, polygon) in SVGLoader
description: Parse basic SVG shapes and convert them to paths for rendering in SVGLoader.
close_reason: Supported via svgelements. Fixed closed subpath rendering and added test coverage.

title: Generate temporary names for unknown tokens
description: Implement a system to generate stable, temporary names for unknown tokens (ArUco IDs without a specific name). The naming style should be configurable (numbered, American, sci-fi, fantasy), with sci-fi as the default. Use the map name as a seed to ensure names are stable across sessions.
close_reason: done

title: Implement SVG <text> Rendering
description: Add support for parsing and rendering <text> elements from SVG files. This involves handling font families, sizes, alignments, and potentially basic CSS styling to allow maps to include legible labels and notes.
close_reason: Implemented <text> rendering.

title: Final Review and PDF Generation
description: Polishing the document and generating the final PDF output.
close_reason: Polished whitepaper and successfully generated the final PDF.

title: Separate ArUco defaults and token profiles into dedicated config
description: Move 'aruco_defaults' and 'token_profiles' from the global map state file into a separate configuration file (e.g., 'tokens.json'). This will make it easier to manage and share token definitions across different installations and reduce the size of the main state file.
close_reason: Implemented automatic migration and separation of token configuration into tokens.json.

title: Epic: Whitepaper - Token Calibration and Tracking
description: Comprehensive whitepaper in LaTeX explaining the calibration and tracking approach.
close_reason: Whitepaper epic completed with final PDF generation.

title: Restructure Configuration and Data Storage
description: Migrate application settings and data files (NPZ, JSON, etc.) to a standard Linux directory structure (e.g., XDG_CONFIG_HOME, XDG_DATA_HOME). Implement a CLI argument to override the base directory for isolated testing and multiple profile support.
close_reason: Implemented StorageManager for XDG-compliant path resolution and added --base-dir override support across main entry points.

title: Epic: Improve System Performance
description: Investigate and implement various strategies to improve overall system performance, reduce latency, and increase framerates. This includes multithreading, caching, and algorithmic optimization.
